text:
I know so many of you don’t believe me … in fact I know so many of you love to joke about my pov on this … but the second you realize it’s TRUE is the second your world and life start to actually move in the right direction. Whether you believe me today or you end up realizing how right I was in 50 years … it won’t matter until you start acting on the truth of it 🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷 I love you all - if you’re ready to finally attack your life without fear DM me now “age aint shit”

PS : Go to the follow or following button in my profile and hit the ⭐️ to add to favorites

#age #advice #inspiration #garyvee

I’m sooooooooo tired of the clouds ☁️ and the rain 🌧️ … my friends …. 99% of you who see this are wonderful and great people .. please start loving yourself ❤️ start appreciating yourself ❤️ start understanding that for many Reasons too many of you put yourselves down and beat yourselves up … STOP 🛑 THAT SHIT … I am telling you, you’re great… now believe it yourself - stop comparing, stop worrying about outside noise and judgment - start slowing down and focusing on what actually matters ❤️❤️❤️❤️🔑 SHARE THIS WITH SOMEONE YOU LOVE 💕

PS: Hit the follow or following button in my profile and hit the ⭐️ to add to favorites

#loveyourself #mindset #garyvee

Sometimes silly shit goes way deeper than people realize .. I will forever  be  grateful for the parents I had and will always want to create narratives and realties that can be used by others as a framework for their own happiness and success ♥️

First, before you read anything, please reply coins to get an auto DM to RSVP for my TikTok live show this Wednesday, April 22nd at 5:15pm EST

And then second, Collectibles continue to explode, @veefriends continues to explode as an intellectual property that I’m building and that’s exciting..

I hope if you’re a collector of any kind, you’ll come and check out the show and get involved in our huge coin drop.

But more importantly, for anybody watching, please come and watch the show and get a sense of what live shopping can be, means, what it is.

It’s a lot of fun.

Listen if you’re scared to “live” “go for it” “put yourself out there” I get it .. insecurity is tough .. but what we have now is those who do that and spend all their time on “hate” .. and that’s just another level .. my friends ..
Don’t do that .. double down on negativity isn’t gonna make you more secure and more happy ❤️❤️❤️

#happiness #mindset #garyvee

It starts with you … you aren’t helping anyone if you aren’t in a good place yourself …

Gratitude 
Accountability 
Resilience 
Yes-mindedness

These are things to keep in mind

#garyvee #happiness #gratitude

I got a little passionate on livestream the other day … lol … I think we may need to stop 🛑 analyzing every fucking step and move and decision and action in our lives … chill 😝 like the reverse of my reaction here lol 😂 … but th 55th question on something that doesn’t mean shit 💩 got me lol 😂

#overanalyzing #overthinking #rant #garyvee

Share this with the young adults in your life :) it might help them :) ❤️❤️❤️

#graduation #speech #graduate #advice #garyvee
An evening comic strip for many of you … which of these  three 3️⃣ “hit for you” … sometimes it takes a comic to “get you there” #perspective #optimism #mindset #garyvee

Everything in life is “allowed” but some respect from the hand that’s feeding you would go a long way towards a happier and more productive life ❤️❤️❤️❤️ just seeing a little too much disrespect and confusion from those who are well into their 20’s and even young 30’s who aren’t understanding the “math” .. you live off them.. they have “say” ❤️❤️❤️

#garyvee #advice #moneyadvice

Which decade are you in ???? And do you get it ? The story will continue too until we hit 100 and then we will assess

#age #perspective #advice #garyvee

Enough of living in your head and in your fears and second guesses and insecurities .. it’s time to throw darts 🎯 … to many yappers and not enough practitioners .. be a practitioner ❤️

#garyvee #actions #experience
